---
id: get-administration-log-payload
title: "Get Administration Log Payload"
description: "Get a URL pointing to a single administration log payload. The received URL will trigger a download."
sidebar_label: "Get Administration Log Payload"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/1nce-os/1-nce-os
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Administration Log Payload"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/administrationLogs/{adminLogId}/payload"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a URL pointing to a single administration log payload. The received URL will trigger a download.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
